module.name: qr
module.description: Generates a QR code (offline, no internet) from the BODY text — the content between the directive and @end. Using the body means URLs with commas, "=", "&" or quotes are encoded verbatim (they would otherwise break the comma-separated argument syntax). Choose error-correction level, pixel size, quiet-zone margin, colors and an optional caption. Emitted as inline SVG, so it shows in thumbnails, PDF export and presenter too.

param.name: caption
param.label: Caption
param.desc: Optional label shown below the QR code.

param.name: text
param.label: Text (fallback)
param.desc: Used only when the body is empty. Prefer the body for anything with commas or special characters.

snippet.label: QR code (with caption)
snippet.text: <!-- @qr ec: M, size: 180, caption: Scan to open --> https://github.com/kjmtks <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: QR from the body URL/text, with a caption. ec: L|M|Q|H.
